summary: Completed frontend testing for 6-part feature request: Specifications section, Stock badges, Box quantity UI, Collapsible Tile Calculator, Series field in admin, and Add to Cart functionality. All 6 features VERIFIED WORKING.

issues: Series field only displays when product has series value set - this is correct behavior but product 'Alabaster 30x60cm' used for testing has no series value

critical_code_review_comments: TileDetailPage.js (line 748-823): Specifications section correctly displays Size, Finish, Tiles per Box, m² per Box, Series (when set), Material, Edge, Slip Rating, etc.
TileDetailPage.js (line 826-854): Stock badge correctly shows In Stock (>30m²), Low Stock (<30m²), or Out of Stock (0) without revealing actual quantities
TileDetailPage.js (line 889-901): Box quantity info correctly displays next to quantity input showing boxes, m², and price
TileDetailPage.js (line 955-995): Tile Calculator implemented as collapsible <details> element with 'Click to expand' hint and quick box selection buttons
ProductForm.js (line 1508-1531): Series field exists with data-testid='series-input' and datalist suggestions for common series names
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features from the feature request have been implemented and tested. Series field in Specifications section only shows when product has series value populated - this is correct conditional rendering behavior.

specifications_section.notes: Series displays conditionally when tile.series or tile.original_series exists

stock_status_badge.verified: Shows 'In Stock' without revealing actual quantity

box_quantity_ui.verified: Shows '= 6 boxes (5.4m²) £156.55' next to quantity input when entering 5m²

add_to_cart_button.verified: Clicking adds box-rounded quantity to cart with toast 'Added 5.4m² to cart'

screenshots_taken: product_page_initial.png - Product page with Specifications visible
product_box_info.png - Box info displayed next to quantity
after_add_to_cart.png - Toast message after adding to cart
admin_series_field.png - Series field in admin ProductForm
